name: Nitin Bhatia
bio: India's most followed real estate legal educator. Covers RERA, builder disputes, home loan traps, property registration, and title issues. Known for exposing common frauds buyers face.
relevance_to_kyl: Huge overlap — audience is exactly KYL's target: buyers worried about legal risks in land/property purchase.
notes: Most credible legal RE creator in India. 1.6M YouTube subscribers as of FY2025.

name: Anuj Puri
bio: Chairman of ANAROCK Property Consultants. Former JLL India Chairman. Weekly market commentary on residential demand, price trends, and policy impact.
relevance_to_kyl: Industry authority voice. His market research overlaps directly with KYL's bottom-up sizing work.
notes: Strongest English-language real estate thought leader in India.

name: Prashant Thakur
bio: Director & Head of Research at ANAROCK. Publishes quarterly residential market reports covering 7 cities — sales volumes, launches, price trends.
relevance_to_kyl: Primary source for city-level residential data that KYL references.
notes: Most cited research head in Indian residential RE.

name: Pankaj Kapoor
bio: Founder & MD of Liases Foras — India's oldest independent real estate research firm. Regular media commentator on NDTV, ET Now, Bloomberg Quint.
relevance_to_kyl: Data partner potential — Liases Foras is a primary source for residential absorption data.
notes: Trusted by MoHUA and NHB for housing statistics.

name: Real Estate Gyaan
bio: Hindi-language real estate investment education channel. Covers plot investment, RERA project checks, home loan calculation, registry process, and land records.
relevance_to_kyl: Direct audience overlap — covers land/plot investment advice in Hindi, KYL's core use case.
notes: One of the strongest Hindi-language RE channels with a plot/land focus.

name: Mumbai Property Exchange
bio: Mumbai-focused real estate channel covering new project reviews, area guides (Thane, Navi Mumbai, Mira Road, Dombivli), and property investment. Bilingual — Hindi and Marathi.
relevance_to_kyl: MMR peripheral areas have active plotted schemes where title research is critical.
notes: Strong local reach in MMR periphery where plotted developments are active.

name: Bangalore Property Guy
bio: Bengaluru real estate creator covering North Bangalore corridor (Devanahalli, Yelahanka, Hebbal), plotted development reviews, and BBMP/BMRDA approvals.
relevance_to_kyl: Directly in KYL's domain — covers plotted developments and approval status which are core to land due diligence.
notes: Plotted development focus in North Bengaluru is the highest-growth land market in South India.

name: Hyderabad Real Estate Network
bio: Hyderabad-focused real estate content covering HMDA approved layouts, villa plots, open plots in ORR corridor, and RERA project reviews. Telugu-English bilingual.
relevance_to_kyl: Hyderabad open plot market is one of India's most active. Audience directly needs land title research and HMDA approval verification.
notes: Strong Facebook community is key distribution in Telangana.

name: Pune Property Updates
bio: Pune real estate content focused on new launches, Dhanori-Wagholi-Undri corridors, plotted scheme reviews, and PMRDA vs PCMC jurisdiction confusion for buyers.
relevance_to_kyl: Pune's plotted development market — PMRDA/PCMC confusion is exactly the due diligence gap KYL solves.

bio: Gujarati and Hindi real estate content for Ahmedabad, Surat, Rajkot, and Vadodara. Covers RERA Gujarat, NA land conversion, plotted schemes, and investment zones around GIFT City.
relevance_to_kyl: NA land conversion verification is a core KYL use case. Gujarati language dominance in key market.
notes: Gujarat's land market has unique NA-conversion compliance need that KYL can address directly.

name: Delhi NCR Property Talk
bio: Delhi NCR real estate content covering Noida Extension, Yamuna Expressway, Gurgaon sectors, and farmhouse/plot investments. Hindi-English bilingual.
relevance_to_kyl: NCR plot market (Yamuna Expressway, Jewar area) is high-risk for buyers. KYL's title verification directly addresses this audience's fear.
notes: Yamuna Expressway / Jewar corridor is booming due to airport and F1 track proximity. Land scams are rife.

name: NRI Property India
bio: Dedicated to NRI buyers navigating Indian property purchases remotely. Covers FEMA regulations, power of attorney risks, NRI home loans, repatriation of sale proceeds, and trusted agent selection.
relevance_to_kyl: NRIs are the highest-value KYL target — they pay premium for remote verification and digital land reports.
notes: NRI audience has highest willingness to pay for land due diligence.

name: Plot Mitra
bio: India's first YouTube channel dedicated exclusively to plot and land investment — covering layout approvals, title checks, NA vs agricultural land, land records (7/12, patta), and ROI analysis.
relevance_to_kyl: Closest content creator to KYL's exact use case — covers exactly what KYL does for the same audience (plot buyers). High partnership priority.
notes: Most aligned creator to KYL's product. Should be a top-priority distribution partner.

name: Ashish Punamia (RERA Expert)
bio: MahaRERA expert and consumer advocate. Covers builder delays, RERA complaints process, OC/CC certificates, and buyer rights under MahaRERA. Marathi and Hindi content.

relevance_to_kyl: Tamil language is critical for Tamil Nadu — DTCP layout approval and patta transfer are exactly what KYL's report covers.
notes: Tamil content in real estate is underserved — strong first-mover advantage for KYL in Tamil Nadu partnership.

bio: Instagram-first real estate and home content creator. Covers home buying journey, vastu for home, interior design after possession, and real estate investment for millennials.

notes: Tamil Nadu's patta-chitta-EC process is the most asked-about land document workflow in South India.

name: Bengaluru Sites Guide
bio: Bengaluru residential sites (BDA and BBMP layouts) in Kannada. Covers Whitefield periphery sites, Sarjapur Road corridor, Begur Road to Electronic City plots, and Bengaluru East zone approvals.
relevance_to_kyl: BDA and BBMP layout approvals plus Khata status are Bengaluru's primary land due diligence requirements — KYL's exact product.
notes: Whitefield-Sarjapur corridor is Bengaluru's most active IT professional residential plots market.

name: RE Soch — Hindi Real Estate
bio: Hindi real estate investment education for Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities. Covers affordable plot investment, RERA for small towns, land circle rate vs market value in North India, and return calculations for plot buyers.
relevance_to_kyl: Tier-2 Hindi-belt audience buying plots — exactly who needs KYL's affordable digital land report to verify before purchase.
notes: Tier-2 city plot buyers are an underserved but large KYL segment — affordable product tier needed.

name: Suresh Prabhu — Property Legal
bio: Property lawyer and YouTuber covering all aspects of real estate legal due diligence — title search, sale deed red flags, power of attorney misuse, will vs gift deed, and property dispute resolution.
relevance_to_kyl: Legal due diligence content is exactly what KYL's land report automates. His audience actively searches for tools to check property title.
notes: Property legal content in Hindi is underserved — his rapid growth shows high demand.

name: Harpreet Singh — Punjab Zameen
bio: Punjab agricultural land and plot investment in Punjabi. Covers Fard (land record) reading, mutation process in Punjab, khasra girdawari, agricultural to commercial conversion in Punjab, and NRI Punjabi land investment.
relevance_to_kyl: Fard and khasra records are the Punjab equivalents of 7/12 — KYL's land record verification directly serves this Punjabi-language audience.
notes: Punjabi-language RE content is extremely underserved — high first-mover advantage for KYL.

name: Telangana Land Guide
bio: Telangana land investment guide in Telugu. Covers Dharani portal (TS land records), HMDA layout verification, Pahani (land record) reading, mutation and Pattadar Passbook process, and open plot investment near Hyderabad.
relevance_to_kyl: Dharani portal is Telangana's digital land record system — KYL integrates exactly this data. Teaching buyers to read Dharani is KYL's product use case.
notes: Dharani is one of India's most advanced state land record systems — Telangana buyers are already digitally primed for KYL.

name: Karnataka Land Records Help
bio: Karnataka Bhoomi land records education in Kannada. Covers RTC (Record of Rights, Tenancy and Crops), mutation in Karnataka, B-Khata issues, Kaveri online property search, and DC conversion process.
relevance_to_kyl: Bhoomi RTC, Kaveri, and DC conversion are the three key Karnataka land verification steps — KYL automates all of them.
notes: Karnataka has some of India's best digital land records (Bhoomi, Kaveri) — buyers are primed to use digital tools.

name: Rajkumar Choudhary — UP Land
bio: UP land records and plot investment in Hindi. Covers Bhulekh UP (online land records), Khasra Khatauni, UP RERA, Noida-Greater Noida plotted schemes, and LDA/ADA approval verification.
relevance_to_kyl: Bhulekh UP is UP's digital land record portal — KYL integrates this data. His audience is exactly KYL's UP target segment.
notes: UP is India's largest state by population and one of the most active land markets — critical KYL coverage.
